scenarios.description: clone() preserves a non-null connection field so clone.connection() returns the same instance
scenarios.precondition: original Document has connection set via connection(Connection)
scenarios.expectedResult: cloned.connection() returns the exact same Connection instance
pseudocode: TEST TC11 clone preserves non-null connection

scenarios.description: clone() deep-clones OutputSettings syntax=xml so subsequent changes to original.settings do not affect clone
scenarios.precondition: original Document outputSettings.syntax set to xml and escapeMode extended
scenarios.expectedResult: cloned.outputSettings retains xml syntax and extended escapeMode even after original changes
pseudocode: TEST TC12 clone deep-copies xml syntax settings
